title: Dhosth
desc: Vijay falls for his friend's sister, but a secret from the past changes everything. Soon, he gives up love to keep his best friend, making a tough choice.

title: Rajaputhran
desc: Anand, a professional wildlife photographer, is forced to look after his father's business after his father dies. However, a string of unpleasant experiences leaves him in a dreary situation.

title: Gold
desc: On discovering a mysterious truck filled with illegal gold, a young man consumed with greed hatches an egotistical plan to use the treasure to his own advantage.

title: Jalolsavam
desc: With his father's death, Chandran takes responsibility for his family along with the debts that his father has left behind. He also has to save his love from getting married to someone else.

title: Kakka
desc: Chellappan saves Devi from drowning and soon falls in love with her. However, his reluctance to express his feelings leads to a rivalry with another man who has fallen for Devi.

title: Pavam I. A. Ivachan
desc: I A Ivachan, a criminal lawyer, strives to fight for truth and justice in a society where the poor are exploited by the rich.

title: Filler
desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Filler
desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Soorya Manasam
desc: The villagers subject a woman to social stigma because of her son's intellectual disability.

title: Pavam Pavam Rajakumaran
desc: A man starts receiving letters from a girl named Radhika and develops an attraction towards her. Little does he know that it is a prank played by his own friends and the girl is fictitious.

title: Sharja To Sharja
desc: When Unni gets wrongly accused of murder in Dubai, Sheikh Jasim Khalid Al Mubarak Mehbali offers his help to Unni's brother. However, he is unaware that the sheikh has vile plans.

title: Nair Saab
desc: Major Nair faces a difficult situation when he discovers that a dangerous criminal has been forcing two army trainees to import drugs from a neighboring country.

title: Adhyarathri
desc: Manoharan is the official matchmaker for the villagers of Mullakkara. However, since his calculations do not go as planned for Ashwathy, he tries to set things right.

title: Sim
desc: On his colleagues' insistence, Iyer, a villager, takes to social media to find the perfect wife for himself. One fine day, his life changes completely after he receives a call from a stranger.
